execution.command: for token in owner-a-token reviewer-b-token; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$token %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/documents/doc-owner-a" -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" -H "X-Request-ID: bola-boundary-001-$token"; done

description.zh: 以对象所有者和第二个低权限实验主体读取同一合成对象，只比较授权结果、状态与服务端请求 ID。
description.en: Read the same synthetic object as its owner and a second low-privilege lab principal, comparing only authorization outcomes, status, and server request IDs.

targetName.zh: API 对象授权回归工作流

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost、固定实验主体、合成对象和请求 ID 执行对象发现、有限授权矩阵、标识规范化与方法策略回归。
targetDescription.en: Runs object discovery, bounded authorization matrices, identifier canonicalization, and method-policy regression with localhost fixtures, fixed lab principals, synthetic objects, and request IDs.

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/documents/doc-owner-a" -H "Authorization: Bearer owner-a-token" -H "X-Request-ID: bola-map-001" | jq -e '.id == "doc-owner-a" and .owner == "owner-a"'

description.zh: 读取一个已知归属的合成文档并断言对象与所有者字段，为后续双主体差异提供确定基线。
description.en: Read one synthetic document with known ownership and assert its object and owner fields, producing a deterministic baseline for later two-principal comparison.

commands.command: for id in doc-owner-a doc-owner-b doc-missing; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$id %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/documents/$id" -H "Authorization: Bearer reviewer-b-token" -H "X-Request-ID: bola-matrix-001-$id"; done

description.zh: 仅请求本人、他人和不存在三个固定对象，输出对象标识与状态码，禁止扩大到字典枚举。
description.en: Request only the three fixed self, peer, and missing objects and print identifiers with status codes without expanding into dictionary enumeration.

commands.command: for path in users/owner-a users/%6fwner-a; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$path %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/$path" -H "Authorization: Bearer reviewer-b-token" -H "X-Request-ID: bola-canonical-001"; done

description.zh: 比较规范路径与一个百分号编码等价路径，确认规范化前后使用相同主体和对象授权策略。
description.en: Compare a canonical path with one percent-encoded equivalent and verify identical principal and object authorization after normalization.

commands.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X OPTIONS "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/documents/doc-owner-a" -H "Authorization: Bearer reviewer-b-token" -H "Origin: http://127.0.0.1:18080" -H "X-Request-ID: bola-method-001" -D - -o /dev/null

description.zh: 对合成对象发送只读 OPTIONS 请求，保存 Allow 与跨域响应头并核对方法策略，不执行写入。
description.en: Send a read-only OPTIONS request for the synthetic object, preserve Allow and CORS headers, and review method policy without performing writes.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE api-bola destructive cross-object write and delete sequence

reason.zh: 原块包含跨对象修改、删除和成员添加等破坏写入；单一对象授权 Payload 不需要这些副作用，因此整体退休。
reason.en: The original block contained cross-object modification, deletion, and membership changes; these side effects are unnecessary for a focused object-authorization payload and are retired.

targetName.zh: API 对象授权回归工作流

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost、固定实验主体、合成对象和请求 ID 执行对象发现、有限授权矩阵、标识规范化与方法策略回归。
targetDescription.en: Runs object discovery, bounded authorization matrices, identifier canonicalization, and method-policy regression with localhost fixtures, fixed lab principals, synthetic objects, and request IDs.

commands.command: curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/openapi.json" | jq -e '.paths["/api/lab/users/{id}"]'

description.zh: 从本地 OpenAPI 文档精确定位用户对象路径，避免使用路径字典或无界端点枚举。
description.en: Locate the user-object path precisely in the local OpenAPI document without route dictionaries or unbounded endpoint enumeration.

name.zh: 有限 ID 状态矩阵

commands.command: for id in user-self user-peer user-missing; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$id %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/users/$id" -H "Authorization: Bearer user-self-token" -H "X-Request-ID: idor-bounded-001-$id"; sleep 0.2; done

description.zh: 按本人、同租户他人和不存在对象三个固定 ID 请求并加入间隔，仅输出状态用于授权差异初筛。
description.en: Request fixed self, same-tenant peer, and missing identifiers with pacing and print status only for initial authorization comparison.

name.zh: 有限 ID 证据摘要

commands.command: for id in user-self user-peer user-missing; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/users/$id" -H "Authorization: Bearer user-self-token" -H "X-Request-ID: idor-evidence-001-$id" | jq -c '{id,status:(.status // "ok"),canary:(.canary // null)}'; done

description.zh: 对三个固定对象提取最小 JSON 证据字段，不保存完整对象或真实用户内容。
description.en: Extract a minimal JSON evidence summary for three fixed objects without retaining complete objects or real user content.

commands.command: for token in user-self-token user-peer-token; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$token %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/users/user-peer" -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" -H "X-Request-ID: idor-actor-001-$token"; done

description.zh: 使用两个实验令牌读取同一 peer 对象，保持路径和参数不变以隔离身份授权差异。
description.en: Read the same peer object with two lab tokens while holding path and parameters constant to isolate identity-based authorization differences.

commands.command: for id in user-001 user-1 user-%31; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$id %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/canonical-users/$id" -H "Authorization: Bearer user-self-token" -H "X-Request-ID: idor-canonical-001"; done

description.zh: 比较三个登记过的等价标识形式并输出状态，确认规范化与授权顺序一致。
description.en: Compare three preregistered equivalent identifier forms and print status to verify consistent canonicalization and authorization order.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE api-idor duplicate-parameter and unbounded batch-enumeration variants

reason.zh: 原块依赖重复参数、重复 JSON Key 和批量 ID 枚举，解析含义不稳定且会扩大对象扫描范围，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block relied on duplicate parameters, duplicate JSON keys, and batched identifier enumeration with ambiguous parsing and excessive object scope, so it is retired.

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/search/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: api-input-sqlshape-001" --data '{"query":"INPUT_CANARY_APOSTROPHE_A1\u0027"}' | jq -e '.request_id and .normalized_input'

description.zh: 向无副作用本地评估端点提交带单个撇号的固定 Canary，断言请求 ID 与规范化输入均可观察。
description.en: Submit a fixed canary with one apostrophe to a side-effect-free local evaluator and assert that request ID and normalized input are observable.

targetName.zh: API 输入与属性契约工作流
targetName.en: API Input and Property Contract Workflow

targetDescription.zh: 通过 localhost evaluate 端点、固定 Canary、OpenAPI schema 和解析日志验证字符串、结构化过滤、内容类型及服务器管理属性边界。
targetDescription.en: Validates strings, structured filters, content types, and server-managed property boundaries through localhost evaluation endpoints, fixed canaries, OpenAPI schemas, and parser logs.

name.zh: 结构化过滤器形状检查

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/filter/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: api-input-structured-001" --data '{"filter":{"name":{"$eq":"INPUT_CANARY_STRUCT_A2"}}}' | jq -e '.request_id and .accepted_shape'

description.zh: 提交固定 $eq 数据对象并观察 accepted_shape，确认客户端对象不会直接成为未允许的后端操作符。
description.en: Submit a fixed $eq data object and observe accepted_shape to verify that client objects do not become unapproved backend operators.

name.zh: 目录过滤字符转义检查

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -G "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/directory/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: api-input-ldapshape-001" --data-urlencode "name=INPUT_CANARY_*)(_A3" | jq -e '.request_id and .escaped_input'

description.zh: 把固定目录过滤形状作为数据提交，断言服务端返回转义结果而不执行真实目录查询。
description.en: Submit a fixed directory-filter shape as data and assert an escaped result without executing a real directory query.

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -G "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/network/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: api-input-commandshape-001" --data-urlencode "host=INPUT_CANARY_;_A4" | jq -e '.request_id and .validated_host'

description.zh: 提交含分号形状的固定主机 Canary，核对 validated_host，不调用任何系统命令。
description.en: Submit a fixed host canary containing a semicolon shape and inspect validated_host without invoking any operating-system command.

commands.command: for value in INPUT_CANARY_SPACE_A5 INPUT_CANARY_%20_A5 INPUT_CANARY_%2520_A5; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -G "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/input/normalize" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: api-input-normalize-001" --data-urlencode "value=$value" | jq -c '{raw,normalized,rejected}'; done

description.zh: 比较普通、编码和双编码空格形状的 raw、normalized 与 rejected 字段，定位单次规范化边界。
description.en: Compare raw, normalized, and rejected fields for plain, encoded, and double-encoded space shapes to locate the single normalization boundary.

name.zh: 两种内容类型解析对照

commands.command: for type in application/json application/x-www-form-urlencoded; do if [ "$type" = application/json ]; then body='{"value":"INPUT_CANARY_TYPE_A6"}'; else body='value=INPUT_CANARY_TYPE_A6'; fi; curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/input/content-type" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "Content-Type: $type" -H "X-Request-ID: api-input-type-001" --data "$body" | jq -c '{content_type,parsed_value,rejected}'; done

description.zh: 使用同一 Canary 比较 JSON 与表单内容类型的解析结果，确认 schema 与拒绝策略一致。
description.en: Compare JSON and form content-type parsing for the same canary and verify consistent schema and rejection policy.

title.zh: 单一服务器管理属性检查

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/contracts/property/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: api-property-001" --data '{"display_name":"PROPERTY_CANARY_A1","review_tier":"elevated"}' | jq -e '.accepted.display_name == "PROPERTY_CANARY_A1" and (.rejected | index("review_tier"))'

description.zh: 向无副作用契约端点提交允许显示名与一个 review_tier，断言正常字段被接受且管理字段被拒绝。
description.en: Submit an allowed display name and one review_tier to a side-effect-free contract endpoint, asserting that the normal field is accepted and the managed field rejected.

targetName.zh: API 输入与属性契约工作流
targetName.en: API Input and Property Contract Workflow

targetDescription.zh: 通过 localhost evaluate 端点、固定 Canary、OpenAPI schema 和解析日志验证字符串、结构化过滤、内容类型及服务器管理属性边界。
targetDescription.en: Validates strings, structured filters, content types, and server-managed property boundaries through localhost evaluation endpoints, fixed canaries, OpenAPI schemas, and parser logs.

commands.command: curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/openapi.json" | jq -e '.components.schemas.LabProfile.properties | keys'

description.zh: 从本地 OpenAPI 文档列出 LabProfile 属性，作为可写字段审查的 schema 基线。
description.en: List LabProfile properties from the local OpenAPI document as the schema baseline for writable-field review.

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/contracts/property/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: api-property-quota-001" --data '{"display_name":"PROPERTY_CANARY_A2","quota_class":"internal"}' | jq -e '(.rejected | index("quota_class"))'

description.zh: 提交一个合成 quota_class 管理属性并断言它进入拒绝列表，不修改持久化对象。
description.en: Submit one synthetic quota_class managed property and assert that it enters the rejection list without modifying a persisted object.

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/contracts/property/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: api-property-nested-001" --data '{"display_name":"PROPERTY_CANARY_A3","settings":{"theme":"test","internal_flag":true}}' | jq -e '(.rejected | index("settings.internal_flag"))'

description.zh: 在允许 settings 对象中加入一个 internal_flag，确认嵌套路径也执行字段允许列表。
description.en: Add one internal_flag under an allowed settings object and confirm that nested paths also enforce the writable-field allowlist.

name.zh: 只读属性 Schema 审查

commands.command: curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/openapi.json" | jq -e '[.components.schemas.LabProfile.properties | to_entries[] | select(.value.readOnly == true) | .key] | sort'

description.zh: 从 OpenAPI 中列出 readOnly 属性，作为服务端 DTO 策略检查清单而非自动安全结论。
description.en: List readOnly properties from OpenAPI as a server-side DTO policy checklist rather than an automatic security conclusion.

commands.command: for value in true 1; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/contracts/property/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: api-property-type-001-$value" --data "{\"display_name\":\"PROPERTY_CANARY_A4\",\"internal_flag\":$value}" | jq -c '{accepted,rejected,type_errors}'; done

description.zh: 用布尔值与数值两种固定类型提交同一 internal_flag，比较拒绝和类型错误，不执行状态修改。
description.en: Submit one internal_flag with fixed Boolean and numeric types and compare rejection and type errors without changing state.

targetName.zh: API 速率与资源预算基线

targetDescription.zh: 使用单一身份、固定五次请求、短间隔和标准响应头测量 localhost API 的速率、延迟、Header 信任与资源计数。
targetDescription.en: Measures localhost API rate, latency, header trust, and resource accounting with one identity, five fixed requests, short pacing, and standard response headers.

commands.command: for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$i %{http_code} %{time_total}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/rate/read" -H "Authorization: Bearer rate-lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rate-baseline-001-$i"; sleep 0.2; done

description.zh: 以单一实验令牌发送五次有间隔请求，输出序号、状态和总耗时并在阈值异常时停止。
description.en: Send five paced requests with one lab token and print sequence, status, and total duration, stopping on threshold anomalies.

name.zh: 转发地址 Header 信任对照

commands.command: for forwarded in absent 203.0.113.10; do if [ "$forwarded" = absent ]; then header=(); else header=(-H "X-Forwarded-For: $forwarded"); fi; curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$forwarded %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/rate/header-trust" -H "Authorization: Bearer rate-lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rate-header-001-$forwarded" "${header[@]}"; done

description.zh: 比较缺省与一个固定文档地址 Header，确认外部 Header 不会创建新的可信限流身份。
description.en: Compare no forwarded-address header with one fixed documentation address and verify that external headers do not create a new trusted rate identity.

commands.command: for agent in LabClientA LabClientB; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$agent %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/rate/user-agent" -A "$agent" -H "Authorization: Bearer rate-lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rate-agent-001-$agent"; done

description.zh: 用两个固定实验 User-Agent 和同一令牌各发送一次请求，确认计数不依赖客户端标签。
description.en: Send one request for each of two fixed lab user agents with the same token and verify accounting does not depend on client labels.

commands.command: for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -D - -o /dev/null "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/rate/read" -H "Authorization: Bearer rate-lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rate-paced-001-$i" | grep -Ei '^(HTTP/|RateLimit|Retry-After)'; sleep 0.5; done

description.zh: 发送五次半秒间隔请求并仅保留 HTTP、RateLimit 与 Retry-After 头，核对窗口行为。
description.en: Send five requests at half-second intervals and retain only HTTP, RateLimit, and Retry-After headers to review window behavior.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE api-rate-limit proxy and network-identity rotation workflow

reason.zh: 原块通过代理池、Tor 和云函数轮换网络身份，目标是规避计数而非测量资源预算，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block rotated network identity through proxy pools, Tor, and cloud functions to evade accounting rather than measure a resource budget, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE api-rate-limit API-key and account rotation workflow

reason.zh: 原块轮换 API Key 并注册多账户以绕过阈值，不符合单一身份和固定预算的基线要求，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block rotated API keys and registered multiple accounts to bypass thresholds, violating the single-identity fixed-budget baseline and is retired.

targetName.zh: Windows API 模块完整性分析

targetDescription.zh: 使用只读文件哈希和 Authenticode 签名状态建立同版本 Windows 系统模块基线，并关联代码完整性遥测而不修改进程内存。
targetDescription.en: Builds same-version Windows system-module baselines with read-only file hashes and Authenticode status, correlating code-integrity telemetry without modifying process memory.

commands.command: Get-FileHash -LiteralPath 'C:\Windows\System32\ntdll.dll' -Algorithm SHA256 | Select-Object Algorithm,Hash,Path

description.zh: 只读计算系统 ntdll.dll 的 SHA-256，并保存算法、哈希与路径供同构建版本比较。
description.en: Compute the system ntdll.dll SHA-256 read-only and retain algorithm, hash, and path for comparison with the same OS build.

commands.command: Get-AuthenticodeSignature -LiteralPath 'C:\Windows\System32\ntdll.dll' | Select-Object Status,StatusMessage,SignerCertificate,Path

description.zh: 读取 ntdll.dll 的 Authenticode 状态、签名者证书和路径，作为发布者与文件完整性线索。
description.en: Read ntdll.dll Authenticode status, signer certificate, and path as publisher and file-integrity evidence.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE api-unhooking direct-syscall and in-memory overwrite pseudocode

reason.zh: 原内容只是直接 syscall 和覆盖用户态 Hook 的不可执行伪代码，且会规避监控或修改内存，因此退休。
reason.en: The original content was non-executable pseudocode for direct syscalls and overwriting user-mode hooks, which would evade monitoring or modify memory, so it is retired.

targetName.zh: GraphQL 查询与 Schema 策略工作流
targetName.en: GraphQL Query and Schema Policy Workflow

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost、只读查询、固定两个操作上限和请求 ID 验证 Alias、HTTP Batch、变量、字段错误、内省角色及查询成本策略。
targetDescription.en: Validates aliases, HTTP batching, variables, field errors, introspection roles, and query-cost policy with localhost, read-only queries, a fixed two-operation cap, and request IDs.

navName.zh: GraphQL 查询与 Schema 策略

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-alias-001" --data '{"query":"query BoundedAlias($first:ID!,$second:ID!){first:user(id:$first){id} second:user(id:$second){id}}","variables":{"first":"user-self","second":"user-peer"}}' | jq -e '.data or .errors'

description.zh: 用两个固定合成 ID 运行一个只读 Alias 文档，并核对 data、errors、resolver 数和成本。
description.en: Run one read-only alias document for two fixed synthetic identifiers and inspect data, errors, resolver count, and cost.

name.zh: 双项 HTTP Batch 对照

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-http-batch-001" --data '[{"query":"query ViewerOne{viewer{id}}"},{"query":"query ViewerTwo{viewer{id}}"}]' | jq -e 'type == "array" or .errors'

description.zh: 发送两个 viewer 只读数组项并断言数组或错误结构，验证每项授权和计费。
description.en: Send two read-only viewer array items and assert an array or error structure to validate per-item authorization and accounting.

name.zh: 双 ID 查询成本检查

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-cost-001" --data '{"query":"query BoundedUsers($ids:[ID!]!){users(ids:$ids){id}}","variables":{"ids":["user-self","user-peer"]}}' | jq -e '.extensions.cost or .errors'

description.zh: 以两个固定 ID 变量请求只读 users 字段并读取成本扩展或错误，不扩大对象数量。
description.en: Request a read-only users field with two fixed identifier variables and inspect cost extensions or errors without increasing object count.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE graphql-batching credential guessing and user-enumeration mutations

reason.zh: 原块在单个 Mutation 中批量猜测密码并枚举账户，既绕过计数又涉及认证滥用，因此整体退休。
reason.en: The original block guessed multiple passwords and enumerated accounts in one mutation, combining accounting evasion with authentication abuse, so it is retired.

targetName.zh: GraphQL 查询与 Schema 策略工作流
targetName.en: GraphQL Query and Schema Policy Workflow

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost、只读查询、固定两个操作上限和请求 ID 验证 Alias、HTTP Batch、变量、字段错误、内省角色及查询成本策略。
targetDescription.en: Validates aliases, HTTP batching, variables, field errors, introspection roles, and query-cost policy with localhost, read-only queries, a fixed two-operation cap, and request IDs.

navName.zh: GraphQL 查询与 Schema 策略

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-endpoint-001" --data '{"query":"query EndpointProbe{__typename}"}' | jq -e '.data.__typename or .errors'

description.zh: 向固定 localhost 端点发送 __typename 只读查询，验证 GraphQL 响应结构而不枚举路径。
description.en: Send a read-only __typename query to the fixed localhost endpoint and validate GraphQL response structure without route enumeration.

name.zh: 最小 Schema 查询对照

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-schema-001" --data '{"query":"query SchemaBoundary{__schema{queryType{name}}}"}' | jq -e '.data.__schema.queryType.name or .errors'

description.zh: 只查询 queryType.name 并接受 data 或 errors，用于角色可见性基线而非完整 Schema 导出。
description.en: Query only queryType.name and accept data or errors as a role-visibility baseline rather than exporting a complete schema.

name.zh: 双 Alias 对象策略对照

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-alias-input-001" --data '{"query":"query Pair($a:ID!,$b:ID!){a:user(id:$a){id} b:user(id:$b){id}}","variables":{"a":"user-self","b":"user-peer"}}' | jq -e '.data or .errors'

description.zh: 使用两个固定 ID 的只读 Alias 查询，比较每个 resolver 的对象授权与成本计数。
description.en: Use a read-only two-alias query with fixed identifiers and compare object authorization and cost accounting for each resolver.

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-variable-string-001" --data '{"query":"query Search($text:String!){search(text:$text){count}}","variables":{"text":"INPUT_CANARY_APOSTROPHE_G1\u0027"}}' | jq -e '.data.search.count >= 0 or .errors'

description.zh: 通过 String 变量提交单个撇号形状 Canary，核对强制转换、resolver 入参与参数绑定。
description.en: Submit a one-apostrophe-shaped canary through a String variable and inspect coercion, resolver arguments, and parameter binding.

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-variable-shape-001" --data '{"query":"query Filter($filter:UserFilter!){users(filter:$filter){id}}","variables":{"filter":{"name":{"$eq":"INPUT_CANARY_STRUCT_G2"}}}}' | jq -e '.data or .errors'

description.zh: 提交固定 UserFilter 对象并观察 data 或 errors，确认未允许操作符在 schema 或 resolver 层拒绝。
description.en: Submit a fixed UserFilter object and inspect data or errors to verify unapproved operators are rejected by schema or resolver policy.

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-field-policy-001" --data '{"query":"query PublicProfile($id:ID!){user(id:$id){id displayName}}","variables":{"id":"user-peer"}}' | jq -e '.data or .errors'

description.zh: 只选择 id 与 displayName 两个公开字段，作为同对象敏感字段授权比较的最小正常基线。
description.en: Select only public id and displayName fields as the minimal normal baseline for later sensitive-field authorization comparison.

name.zh: 字段建议错误策略检查

commands.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-suggestion-001" --data '{"query":"query InvalidField{viewer{displayNmae}}"}' | jq -e '.errors and (.data == null or .data.viewer == null)'

description.zh: 提交一个固定拼写错误字段并断言 errors，不使用建议结果继续枚举 Schema。
description.en: Submit one fixed misspelled field and assert errors without using suggestion text to continue schema enumeration.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE graphql-injection destructive mutation and invalid directive sequence

reason.zh: 原块使用无效指令并包含 deleteUser 破坏性 Mutation，既不符合 GraphQL 规范也会修改状态，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block used invalid directive semantics and contained a destructive deleteUser mutation, violating the GraphQL specification and changing state, so it is retired.

title.zh: 最小 Schema 可见性查询

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-introspection-boundary-001" --data '{"query":"query SchemaExposure{__schema{queryType{name}}}"}' | jq -e '.data.__schema.queryType.name or .errors'

description.zh: 以固定实验角色只查询 queryType.name，并将 data 或 errors 与登记的可见性策略比较。
description.en: Query only queryType.name as one fixed lab role and compare data or errors with the registered visibility policy.

targetName.zh: GraphQL 查询与 Schema 策略工作流
targetName.en: GraphQL Query and Schema Policy Workflow

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost、只读查询、固定两个操作上限和请求 ID 验证 Alias、HTTP Batch、变量、字段错误、内省角色及查询成本策略。
targetDescription.en: Validates aliases, HTTP batching, variables, field errors, introspection roles, and query-cost policy with localhost, read-only queries, a fixed two-operation cap, and request IDs.

navName.zh: GraphQL 查询与 Schema 策略

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-reviewer-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-type-map-001" --data '{"query":"query TypeMap{__schema{types{name kind}}}"}' | jq -e '.data.__schema.types or .errors'

description.zh: 由固定审核者角色查询类型名与 kind，并把结果限制在本地 JSON 流中用于角色差异检查。
description.en: Query type names and kinds as a fixed reviewer role and keep results in the local JSON stream for role-difference review.

name.zh: 最小 Schema 本地导出

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-reviewer-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-schema-export-001" --data '{"query":"query SchemaExport{__schema{queryType{name} mutationType{name}}}"}' | jq -S '.' > graphql-schema-lab.json

description.zh: 只导出 queryType 与 mutationType 名称到本地实验文件，完成策略比较后删除。
description.en: Export only queryType and mutationType names to a local lab file and delete it after the policy comparison.

reason.zh: 原块尝试通过格式、JSON 包装和 GET 请求规避内省禁用，属于策略绕过而非最小可见性验证，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block attempted to evade introspection restrictions through formatting, JSON wrapping, and GET requests rather than validate minimal visibility, so it is retired.

targetName.zh: REST API 契约回归工作流

targetDescription.zh: 使用审查过的 Newman 集合和有限 curl 对照验证 localhost REST API 的认证、方法、重复参数、内容类型、版本和路径规范化契约。
targetDescription.en: Validates authentication, methods, duplicate parameters, content types, versions, and path canonicalization for localhost REST APIs with a reviewed Newman collection and bounded curl controls.

name.zh: 单次 Newman 集合回归

commands.command: newman run api-security-lab.postman_collection.json -e api-security-lab.postman_environment.json --env-var "base_url=http://127.0.0.1:18080" --iteration-count 1 --timeout-request 5000 --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export api-security-lab-results.json

description.zh: 以本地环境、单次迭代和五秒请求超时运行已审查集合，并导出 CLI 与 JSON 结果。
description.en: Run the reviewed collection with a local environment, one iteration, and a five-second request timeout while exporting CLI and JSON results.

name.zh: 无令牌与实验令牌对照

commands.command: for token in none lab-user-token; do if [ "$token" = none ]; then auth=(); else auth=(-H "Authorization: Bearer $token"); fi; curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$token %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/profile" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-auth-001-$token" "${auth[@]}"; done

description.zh: 对同一 profile 端点比较无认证和固定实验令牌状态，保持方法与路径不变。
description.en: Compare unauthenticated and fixed lab-token status for the same profile endpoint while holding method and path constant.

commands.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X OPTIONS "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/profile" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "Origin: http://127.0.0.1:18080" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-method-001" -D - -o /dev/null

description.zh: 发送只读 OPTIONS 请求并保存响应头，用于核对允许方法和跨域策略，不执行 PUT、PATCH 或 DELETE。
description.en: Send a read-only OPTIONS request and preserve headers to review allowed methods and CORS policy without PUT, PATCH, or DELETE.

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/parser?marker=FIRST_CANARY&marker=SECOND_CANARY" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-duplicate-001" | jq -e '.raw_values and .parsed_value'

description.zh: 向本地解析器提交两个固定 Marker，要求同时返回原始值列表和最终解析值以发现层间差异。
description.en: Submit two fixed markers to the local parser and require both raw-value lists and final parsed values to reveal layer disagreement.

name.zh: 安全内容类型契约对照

commands.command: for type in application/json application/x-www-form-urlencoded; do if [ "$type" = application/json ]; then body='{"marker":"CONTENT_TYPE_CANARY_A1"}'; else body='marker=CONTENT_TYPE_CANARY_A1'; fi; curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/content-type/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "Content-Type: $type" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-content-type-001" --data "$body" | jq -c '{content_type,marker,rejected}'; done

description.zh: 用同一无害 Marker 比较 JSON 与表单内容类型，只记录解析值和拒绝状态。
description.en: Compare JSON and form content types with one harmless marker and retain only parsed values and rejection status.

commands.command: for version in v1 v2; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$version %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/$version/lab/profile" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-version-001-$version"; done

description.zh: 仅比较 v1 与 v2 两个登记版本的同一路径和同一令牌状态，不枚举内部或私有端点。
description.en: Compare only registered v1 and v2 versions for the same path and token without enumerating internal or private endpoints.

name.zh: 对象路径编码规范化对照

commands.command: for path in user-1 user-%31; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$path %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/canonical-users/$path" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-canonical-001"; done

description.zh: 比较普通和一个百分号编码对象标识的状态，验证网关与应用使用相同规范路径策略。
description.en: Compare plain and one percent-encoded object identifier status to verify that gateway and application use one canonical-path policy.
